notableEvents.label: José Fermín GIDP
notableEvents.detail: José Fermín grounds into a double play, shortstop Joey Ortiz to second baseman Brice Turang to first baseman Jake Bauers. Nolan Gorman out at 2nd. José Fermín out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: José Fermín rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: José Fermín grounds into a double play, shortstop Joey Ortiz to second baseman Brice Turang to first baseman Jake Bauers. Nolan Gorman out at 2nd. José Fermín out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: José Fermín reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Joey Ortiz. Nolan Gorman scores.

notableEvents.label: José Fermín reached on error
notableEvents.detail: José Fermín reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Joey Ortiz. Nolan Gorman scores.

notableEvents.label: William Contreras plunked
notableEvents.detail: William Contreras hit by pitch. Brice Turang to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: William Contreras GIDP
notableEvents.detail: William Contreras grounds into a double play, second baseman JJ Wetherholt to shortstop Masyn Winn to first baseman Alec Burleson. Jackson Chourio out at 2nd. William Contreras out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Pitcher Andre Pallante picks off Jake Bauers at 1st on throw to first baseman Alec Burleson.

notableEvents.label: Wild pitch run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Wild pitch by pitcher Andre Pallante. Joey Ortiz scores. Sal Frelick to 2nd.
